description: Ticket Tailor is an event ticketing platform for creating box offices, selling tickets, and managing events, orders, tickets, memberships, and check-ins. It also provides an MCP server so AI assistants can operate against a Ticket Tailor box office.
summary: Ticket Tailor exposes a REST API at https://api.tickettailor.com authenticated with a box-office API key over HTTP Basic auth, plus an MCP server at https://mcp.tickettailor.ai/mcp using the same Ticket Tailor API key via MCP OAuth.
